title: Dekton 25 Litre Paint Mixer-Fits All Electrical Drills|Hex Shaped Shaft|Speeds 200-700rpm|Designed Angled Blade For Optimum Mixing Lightweight|Large And Robust To Cope|For Mixing Paints,Mortar, Cement
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Universal Compatibility: Designed to fit all standard electrical drills, this versatile paint mixer effortlessly integrates with your existing tools, allowing for quick and easy mixing of paints, mortar, and cement. The hex-shaped shaft ensures a secure fit and reliable performance with various drill models.

Optimal Mixing Efficiency: Featuring an angled blade specifically engineered for superior mixing, this paint mixer guarantees thorough and consistent results. The unique blade design ensures even blending and prevents clumping, making it ideal for achieving the perfect consistency in your mixtures.

Wide Speed Range: Capable of operating within a speed range of 200 to 700 RPM, this paint mixer provides the flexibility needed for different mixing tasks. Adjust the speed according to the material being mixed to achieve optimal results, whether you're dealing with thick mortar or thin paint.

Robust and Lightweight Construction: Constructed from durable materials, the paint mixer is both lightweight and robust, designed to withstand heavy-duty use. Its sturdy build ensures long-lasting performance, while its lightweight design minimizes user fatigue during extended mixing sessions.

Heavy-Duty and Reliable: Built to cope with demanding mixing tasks, the large and robust design of this mixer ensures it can handle tough materials without compromising performance. Whether you're mixing paint for a big project or preparing cement for construction, this mixer delivers reliable results every time.
